---
title: "Mediterranean Digital Media Observatory MedDMO"
sort_year: 2028
year: "2022 – 2028"
status: "Ongoing"
funder: "H2020 DIGITAL-2024-BESTUSE-TECH-07 (GA no. 101083756)"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring, Ongoing]
---

**Year:** 2022 – 2028
**Status:** Ongoing
**Funder:** H2020 DIGITAL-2024-BESTUSE-TECH-07 (GA no. 101083756)
**Research Cluster:** Media & Social Media Monitoring
